title: A Wheel in the Middle of a Wheel
summary: Ezekiel's vision of a wheel within a wheel symbolizes God's sovereignty and divine orchestration over history and individual lives. While the Israelites faced captivity in Babylon, God reassured them of His control and presence, promising to be their sanctuary even in exile (Ezekiel 11:16). The wheels, moving in perfect harmony, illustrate that God directs the course of events, weaving trials and triumphs into His grand design. Like small wheels within the Great Wheel, our lives are part of His intricate plan, shaped by His guidance and purpose. Even in moments of chaos, we can trust that God's hand is at work, leading us toward renewal and hope. The vision also serves as a call to repentance, urging people to turn away from idolatry and realign their hearts with God's will. Ezekiel’s prophetic acts exemplify unwavering obedience, showing that faith often requires stepping beyond comfort to fulfill God’s mission. As believers, we are called to embrace our roles in His divine narrative, trusting that every hardship, every redirection, is part of a greater purpose. Surrendering to God's will does not mean losing control but finding peace in His divine orchestration. In all seasons, whether in joy or trial, we are reminded that our lives are in the hands of the Great Wheel, whose movements are always purposeful, leading us toward His ultimate glory.
